com.android.decode.configuration

类 MultiScan

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
      • com.android.decode.configuration.MultiScan

  • public class MultiScan
extends PropertyGroup
    MultiScan is the class that configures the Multi Scan functionality.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      BooleanProperty enable
      enable activates the Multi Scan.
      NumericProperty labelCount
      labelCount defines the number of required labels to be read before automatically ending a good read transaction.
      TextProperty labelMiddle
      labelMiddle is a string of Unicode characters sent on the middle of mutilscan data
      NumericProperty multiResultSendMode 
      BooleanProperty notifyOnEachLabel
      notifyOnEachLabel defines whether to notify each successfully read label during Multi Scan operation.

      • 从类继承的字段 com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup

        _groupList, _list

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      MultiScan(PropertyGetter editor)
      This is the constructor of MultiScan.

    • 方法概要

      • 从类继承的方法 com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup

        getGroups, getProperties, isFullySupported, isSupported, load, store

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • enable

        public BooleanProperty enable
        enable activates the Multi Scan.

      • labelCount

        public NumericProperty labelCount
        labelCount defines the number of required labels to be read before automatically ending a good read transaction. The decoding session is ended successfully and all the collected labels are returned together, only if the labelCount is reached.

      • multiResultSendMode

        public NumericProperty multiResultSendMode

      • labelMiddle

        public TextProperty labelMiddle
        labelMiddle is a string of Unicode characters sent on the middle of mutilscan data

      • notifyOnEachLabel

        public BooleanProperty notifyOnEachLabel
        notifyOnEachLabel defines whether to notify each successfully read label during Multi Scan operation.

    • 构造器详细资料

      • MultiScan

        public MultiScan(PropertyGetter editor)
        This is the constructor of MultiScan. All options are initialized by editor.
        参数:
        editor - A PropertyGetter used to load the current configuration class.
